info.DAtuviSezaH: DAtO vidyamAnaH cakAraH OpadeSikaH nAsti apitu Ce ca 6.1.73 iti tugAgame stoH ScunA ScuH 8.4.40 iti Scutve kfte sidDyati
info.english_meaning: to errto neglect to ignore to make a mistake
info.hindI_arTa: durlakzya karanA asAvaDAna rahanA pramAda karanA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'yA samrAjA manasA na prayucCataH' (f॰10.65.5) yO samrAjO manasA'sannihitO na Bavata ityarTaH na pramAdyata iti DAtUkto'rTaH

'venanantA na pra yucCataH DftavratAya dASuze' (f॰1.25.6) kevalasya yucCatestvapasaraRamapasarpaRaM vA'rTaH- 'na yo yucCati tizyo yaTA divaH' (aTavaM॰5.54.13) - 'kadAcana prayucCasi' (tE0 saM0 1422) kadAcana na yucCasi na pramAdyasi praSabdo DAtvarTasya nivfttiM karoti prasmaraRaM prasTAnaM prapUraRamityatra yaTeti BawwaBAskaraH praSabdo nizeDArTa iti ca sAyaRaH
'aprayucCan pura etu prajAnan' (tE0 brA0 2416) aprayucCan apramAdyan
